/* === Variant: double-doors (600x570, depth 92) === */
/* Generated by BoxForge v2.1 — 7 panes (5 struct, 2 lid, 0 extra) */

.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant {
  --double-doors-w: 600px;
  --double-doors-h: 570px;
  --box-d: 46px;
  --box-half: -46px;
  --bevel-w: 2px;
  --box-dark: #0a0a08;
  --box-dark2: #000000;
  --box-light: #3a4030;
  --box-floor: #1a1812;
  --box-ceil: #2a3020;
  --box-glow: rgba(220,200,160,0.6);
  --perspective: 800px;
  perspective: 800px;
  width: 600px;
  height: 570px;
}
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .box3d-scene {
  width: 600px; height: 570px;
  transform: rotateX(5deg) rotateY(-7deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .box3d-spin {
  width: 600px; height: 570px;
}
.double-doors-variant .box3d-body {
  width: 600px; height: 570px;
}

/* Back (back): 600 x 570 */
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .bf-back {
  width: 600px; height: 570px;
  background: transparent;
  transform: translateZ(-46px) translate(0px,0px);
  display: none;
}
/* Left Jam (left): 92 x 570 */
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .bf-left {
  width: 92px; height: 570px;
  left: 254px; top: 0px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #1c2212, #3a4030 40%, #1c2212 70%, #1c2212);
  transform: translate(-304px,0px) rotateY(90deg) translateZ(0px);
}
/* Right Jam (right): 92 x 570 */
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .bf-right {
  width: 92px; height: 570px;
  left: 254px; top: 0px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #1c2212, #3a4030 40%, #1c2212 70%, #1c2212);
  transform: translate(302px,0px) rotateY(90deg) translateZ(0px);
}
/* Lintel (top): 600 x 92 */
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .bf-top {
  width: 600px; height: 92px;
  left: 0px; top: 239px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #0c1202, #2a3020 40%, #0c1202 70%, #0c1202);
  transform: translate(0px,2px) rotateX(90deg) translateZ(285px) translateY(0px);
}
/* Sill (bottom): 600 x 92 */
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .bf-bottom {
  width: 600px; height: 92px;
  left: 0px; top: 239px;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0px, transparent 11px, rgba(0,0,0,0.35) 11px, rgba(0,0,0,0.35) 12px), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0px, transparent 11px, rgba(0,0,0,0.35) 11px, rgba(0,0,0,0.35) 12px), #1a1812;
  transform: translate(0px,1px) rotateX(90deg) translateZ(-285px) translateY(0px);
}

/* Lid: Left Door (300x570, hinge: left, open: 101°, hover: 23°) [label: "to [floor N]" dir:rtl 30px] */
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .box3d-lid-wrap--0 {
  position: absolute; transform-style: preserve-3d;
  width: 300px; height: 570px;
  left: 150px; top: 0px;
  transform: translateZ(46px) translate(-150px,0px);
}
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .box3d-lid--0 {
  width: 300px; height: 570px;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, #6e4828 0px, #6e4828 8px, #502a0a 8px, #502a0a 9px);
  transform-origin: 0px center;
  transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1);
  /* wiring: Left leaf — opens on interact. | Toggle .opened class on click. */
}
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant.hovered .box3d-lid--0 {
  transform: rotateY(-23deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant.opened .box3d-lid--0 {
  transform: rotateY(-101deg);
}

/* Lid: Right Door (300x570, hinge: right, open: 104°, hover: 33°) [label: "to [Floor N]" dir:ltr 30px] */
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .box3d-lid-wrap--1 {
  position: absolute; transform-style: preserve-3d;
  width: 300px; height: 570px;
  left: 150px; top: 0px;
  transform: translateZ(46px) translate(150px,0px);
}
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant .box3d-lid--1 {
  width: 300px; height: 570px;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, #5e4026 0px, #5e4026 8px, #402208 8px, #402208 9px);
  transform-origin: 300px center;
  transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1);
  /* wiring: Right leaf — mirrors left leaf hinge. */
}
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant.hovered .box3d-lid--1 {
  transform: rotateY(33deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.double-doors-variant.opened .box3d-lid--1 {
  transform: rotateY(104deg);
}

/* === GLOW SOURCES (4) === */
.double-doors-glow-0 { /* Floor glow */
  position: absolute;
  width: 840px; height: 798px;
  left: calc(50% - 420px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 399px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(90deg) rotateY(0deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(220,200,160,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.double-doors-glow-1 { /* Cross glow 1 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 840px; height: 798px;
  left: calc(50% - 420px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 399px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(220,200,160,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.double-doors-glow-2 { /* Cross glow 2 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 840px; height: 798px;
  left: calc(50% - 420px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 399px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(60deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(220,200,160,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.double-doors-glow-3 { /* Cross glow 3 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 840px; height: 798px;
  left: calc(50% - 420px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 399px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(120deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(220,200,160,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}


/*
 * === WIRING NOTES (for JS implementation) ===
  Left Door: Left leaf — opens on interact.
    Toggle .opened class on click.
  Left Door label: "to [floor N]" (rtl, 30px)
  Right Door: Right leaf — mirrors left leaf hinge.
  Right Door label: "to [Floor N]" (ltr, 30px)
 */

/*
 * === PANE TEXT / LABEL ASSIGNMENTS ===
 *   Left Door (front): "to [floor N]"  direction: rtl  size: 30px  texture: wood-plank
 *   Right Door (front): "to [Floor N]"  direction: ltr  size: 30px  texture: wood-plank
 *
 * Wire these labels in the peek module's _show() method via:
 *   el.querySelector('.box3d-lid .box3d-face').textContent = labelText;
 *   el.querySelector('.box3d-lid .box3d-face').style.writingMode = ...;
 */
